title: Saint Louis UniversityвАЩs New Venture Accelerator Names Third Cohort
summary_en: Saint Louis UniversityвАЩs New Venture Accelerator (NVA), launched in 2024 out of the Chaifetz Center for Entrepreneurship (CCE), announces its third cohort of participants. The NVA offers current SLU students and alumni who graduated within the last five years equity-free investments of up to $50,000 through a special accelerator fund supported by donors. title: SLU Students, Alumnus Awarded NSF Graduate Research Fellowships
summary_en: Three Saint Louis University students and one recent alumnus have been awarded highly competitive National Science Foundation (NSF) Graduate Research Fellowship Programs (GRFP) for 2026. The fellowship recognizes outstanding academic achievement and the potential to make significant contributions to research and society.

title: SSM Health, Saint Louis University partner on RN-to-BSN program
summary_en: A new preferred-provider agreement enables SSM Health nurses to complete a degree in as little as one year while benefiting from tuition reimbursement.
